nasb.text: So he put them in confinement in the house of the captain of the bodyguard, in the jail, the same place where Joseph was imprisoned.

esv.text: and he put them in custody in the house of the captain of the guard, in the prison where Joseph was confined.

cnv.text: 把他們關在軍長府內的監房裡，就是約瑟被囚禁的地方。

ccb.text: 把他们囚禁在护卫长波提乏府内的监牢里，也就是约瑟被囚的地方。

csbs.text: 把他们关到护卫长府中的牢里，就是约瑟被囚的监狱。
